title: oreocharis notochlaena
intro: Oreocharis notochlaena is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the 'orchid monkey flower'. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oreocharis notochlaena are said to include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal remedy.
